subcodes.first_line: O God! O God! Verily, verily the reality of Thy Oneness is sanctified above ascent or descent
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تقدست حقیقت وحدانیتک عن الصعود و النزول و تنزهت شمس احدیتک عن الطلوع
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
